WakeUpPoseidon1ED_5.korean: 이번엔 또 무슨 일로 졸졸 따라다니는 거냐?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_5.english: What are you following me around for this time?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_6.korean: 전에도 말했지만, 할 말 있으면 앞에 나와서 해라.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_6.english: I’ve told you before—if you’ve got something to say, just step forward and speak up.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_7.korean: 따, 따라다니다뇨? 그냥 동선이 겹친 것뿐인데요?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_7.english: W-wait, you’re following me? It’s just that our paths happened to cross.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_8.korean: 그게 벌써 사흘째라는 건 알고서 하는 변명이냐?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_8.english: Are you making excuses because you know it’s already been three days?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_9.korean: 저는 포세이돈 함대의 참모! 자랑스러운 감마 대장님의 부관이라고요?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_9.english: I’m the chief of staff of the Poseidon Fleet! I’m the proud adjutant of Admiral Gamma, right?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_10.korean: 부관이 대장님 곁을 지키는 게 이상한 건 아니잖아요?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_10.english: Isn’t it normal for an adjutant to stay by the captain’s side?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_11.english: If you push it too far, it can become a problem.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_12.english: So? What business do you have with me?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_13.korean: …문득 정신 차리고 보니 그냥 그렇게 되어 버렸다, 뭐 이런 느낌이라서…
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_13.english: … Suddenly I snapped out of it and realized it had just become that way, something like that…

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_14.korean: 저도 그냥… 그렇게 받아들이고 있는 중인데요…
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_14.english: I’m just… trying to accept it that way too…

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_17.korean: 정식으로 오르카에 합류하신 거… 맞으신 거죠?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_17.english: You’ve officially joined Orca, haven’t you?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_19.korean: 아, 그게요~ 북부 전선에서 있었던 일 이후에
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_19.english: Ah, well… after what happened on the northern front…

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_20.korean: 자연스럽게 오르카로 오신 뒤… 사건이 일단락된 이후에도 이렇게 쭉 오르카에 계시잖아요?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_20.english: After you naturally came to Orca and even after the incident was settled, you’ve been staying here ever since, right?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_21.korean: 전에 ‘오르카의 일원이다’ 뭐다 말씀하신 걸 듣긴 했는데…
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_21.english: I did hear you say something about being “a member of Orca” before…

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_22.korean: 이렇게 늦게 여쭈어봐서 죄송하지만, 정식 수속 절차는 전부 끝나신 건가요?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_22.english: I’m sorry to ask so late, but have you finished all the formalities?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_24.korean: 내가 정식으로 오르카의 일원이 됐건 아니건, 딱히 네가 신경 쓸 일은 아니라고 보는데?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_24.english: Whether I officially became a member of Orca or not, I don’t think that’s really your concern.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_25.english: That can’t be! You have to be concerned!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_26.english: I’m Merlin, a bona‑fide Orca operative!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_27.korean: 아서에게는 감마 대장님의 부관으로서 옆에서 보좌해 달라는 부탁도 받았으니까요!
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_27.english: Arthur even asked me to assist him as Admiral Gamma’s adjutant!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_28.korean: 그렇기 때문에 저는 오르카 소속 대원으로서!
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_28.english: That’s why I’m an Orca operative!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_29.korean: 포세이돈 함대의 부관이라는 명예로운 직책을, 자랑스러운 마음으로 맡고 있는 거예요!
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_29.english: I proudly hold the honorable position of adjutant of Poseidon’s fleet!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_30.korean: 그런데 만약 감마 대장님이 오르카 소속이 아니라면…
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_30.english: But if Admiral Gamma isn’t part of Orca…

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_31.korean: 저는 ‘오르카 대원’이면서도, 오르카가 아닌 외부에서의 직책을 자랑스러워하는 셈이잖아요?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_31.english: I’m an “Orca operative,” yet I’m proud of a position outside Orca, aren’t I?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_32.korean: 이건 좀… 문제가 있는 거 아닐까요!?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_33.korean: 무슨 말을 하고 싶은 건지 도무지 모르겠다.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_33.english: I have no idea what you’re trying to say.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_34.korean: 에이! 그냥… 제 마음가짐에 문제가 있다는 거예요~!
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_34.english: Hey! I’m just saying there’s a problem with my mindset!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_35.korean: 그러니까 알려 주세요! 정식으로 오르카에 합류하신 게 맞는 거죠?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_35.english: So please tell me! You’ve officially joined Orca, right?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_36.korean: 안 알려 주시면… 말해 주실 때까지 몇 날 며칠이고 계속 따라다닐 테니까요!
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_36.english: If you don’t tell me… I’ll keep following you for days and days until you do!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_37.korean: 하아… 그래, 맞다. 정식으로 합류했다. 됐지?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_37.english: Haa… right, that’s right. I officially joined. Got it?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_38.english: Well, if you want, should I show you the paperwork?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_40.english: … I see. So you’ve officially joined?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_42.korean: 후후… 우후후… 우흐흐흐흐… 그렇다면 감마 대장님…
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_42.english: Hahaha… Uhuhu… Uhuhuhu… In that case, Admiral Gamma…

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_44.korean: 오르카에 정식으로 합류하셨다면… 이제 약속을 지켜 주실 때가 온 거 아닐까요?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_44.english: If you’ve officially joined Orca… shouldn’t it be time to keep your promise?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_46.korean: ‘잊었다’는 말로 대충 넘어가버리신다면 무진장 섭섭할 예정이라고요.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_46.english: If you just brush it off with “I forgot,” I’m going to be terribly disappointed.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_47.korean: 제가 이날을 얼마나 기다려 왔는지 아세요?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_47.english: Do you know how long I’ve been waiting for this day?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_49.english: I know you all remember, don’t you!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_50.korean: 저랑 같이 카페 하겠다고 하신 약속 말이에요!
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_50.english: I’m talking about the promise you made to open a café with me!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_52.korean: 저, 그때 감마 대장님께 유니폼도 입힐 거라고 분명히 말했어요!
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_52.english: I told Captain Gamma back then that I'd even put a uniform on you!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_54.english: Because you said you'd grant everything, saying “Alright, alright!”

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_55.korean: 하아… 드디어 올 게 왔나 보군…
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_55.english: Sigh… Looks like the moment's finally arrived.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_58.english: Hi, Neri! You're cute today, too!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_60.english: Did you come as a guest today?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_61.english: Right, please guide the two of them.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_63.english: Got it! Two cups of coffee, right?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_64.english: I'll show the two guests in!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_66.english: What are you planning to do by bringing me here?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_67.korean: 고작 카페로 나들이를 같이 가 주겠다는 단순한 약속이 아니었다는 것쯤은 기억하고 있다.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_67.english: I remember it wasn't just a simple promise to go on a cafe outing together.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_68.english: Since we're doing this, we might as well enjoy it!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_69.korean: 감마 대장님께 카페의 즐거움과 멋진 점을 직접 보여 드리는 게 좋겠다고 생각했거든요!
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_69.english: I thought it'd be nice to show Captain Gamma the fun and cool aspects of the café in person!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_70.korean: 여기서 맛있는 커피를 드셔 보시면 카페에 대한 인식이 바뀌실 거예요!
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_70.english: If you try the delicious coffee here, your view of cafés will change!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_71.korean: 그래 봤자 고작 음료 마시는 가게일 뿐 아닌가?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_71.english: But after all, isn't it just a place to drink beverages?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_72.english: Here are the two cups of coffee.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_74.korean: 그러고 보니 카페에서 네가 일하고 있었지.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_74.english: Now that I think about it, you were working at the café.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_75.english: This is the second time I've seen it like this.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_78.english: Even thinking about it again, it's truly baffling.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_79.korean: 그 무적의 용이 유니폼을 입고 커피를 내리는 모습이라니.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_79.english: The invincible dragon wearing a uniform and brewing coffee…

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_80.korean: 지금의 나는 호라이즌 함대의 지휘관이 아니라, 카페 호라이즌의 바리스타요.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_80.english: I'm not the commander of the Horizon fleet right now, but a barista at Café Horizon.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_81.korean: 그리고 소관은 지금의 일도 만족하고 있소.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_81.english: And I'm satisfied with this job as well.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_82.korean: 후후, 그대도 곧 알게 될 거요.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_82.english: Hehe, you'll find out soon enough.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_83.korean: 그럼 소관은 일이 있어 이만 가 보겠소.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_83.english: Well then, I have business to attend to, so I'll be taking my leave.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_85.english: Wow, as expected—still so cool today!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_86.english: Admiral Invincible Dragon, isn't she amazing?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_87.korean: 저게 멋진지는 모르겠다만… 어떤 일이든 진지하게 임하는 모습은 여전하군.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_87.english: I'm not sure that's cool… but you still tackle everything seriously.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_88.english: Anyway… coffee brewed by a dragon…

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_89.english: I didn’t drink it when I came before.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_91.english: How is it? Admiral Invincible Dragon's coffee. Delicious, right?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_92.korean: 오르카에서 대원들이 다들 마시러 올 만큼 호평인 커피라구요!
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_92.english: It's such a hit that everyone at Orca comes over to drink it!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_93.english: Hmm, it does taste good, but…

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_94.korean: 커피 한 잔 내리는 게 뭐가 그리 대단하다고 호들갑을 떠는 거냐?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_94.english: What’s so grand about brewing a single cup of coffee to make such a fuss?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_95.english: Did you just say anyone can come for a drink?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_96.korean: 이걸 마시겠다고 굳이 여기까지 찾아오는 녀석들을… 이해하긴 어렵겠군.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_96.english: I can’t quite understand those who go out of their way to come all the way here just to drink this…

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_97.english: Hmm? The one who just entered the shop is…

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_98.korean: 카페 호라이즌에 어서 오세ㅡ 아! 주인님!
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_98.english: Welcome to Café Horizon— Ah! Master!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_99.english: Hey, I'm here for coffee again today.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_100.korean: 응! 어서 와! 평소랑 같은 걸로, 맞지?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_100.english: Yeah! Come on in! Same as usual, right?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_101.korean:
부탁할게.
요즘은 용의 커피를 마시지 않으면 하루가 제대로 시작되지 않는 기분이야.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_101.english: Please. These days, I feel like my day can’t really start unless I have a dragon’s coffee.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_103.korean:
커피 여기 있소.
방금 막 내린 참이오.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_103.english: Here’s the coffee. It just finished brewing.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_104.korean: 어? 내 주문은 방금 들어갔을 텐데?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_104.english: Huh? My order should’ve just been placed.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_105.korean: 후후, 이렇게 매일 같은 시간에 와서 같은 메뉴를 시키면 몸이 기억하게 되는 법이오.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_105.english: Heh, if you come at the same time every day and order the same thing, your body gets used to it.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_106.korean: 아니면… 오늘은 좀 다른 걸 원했소?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_106.english: Or… did you want something different today?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_108.english: Mmm—dragon’s coffee is just as good as ever.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_109.korean: 늘 맛있는 커피를 내려 줘서 고마워.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_109.english: Thanks for always making such great coffee.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_110.korean: 아니오. 이걸로 조금이라도 주군께 도움이 되었다면 소관은 기쁠 따름이오.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_110.english: No, it’s my pleasure. If this helps you even a little, I’m delighted.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_114.korean: 저랑 같이 카페를 해서… 맛있는 음료를 아서에게 만들어 준다면
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_114.english: If we run a café together and make tasty drinks for Arthur—

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_115.korean: 아서도 분명 기뻐하면서 마셔 줄 거라구요!
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_115.english: Arthur will surely be thrilled to drink them!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_116.korean: 대장님이 직접 만든 음료를 마시면서 웃는 아서의 모습… 보고 싶지 않으세요?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_116.english: Don’t you want to see Arthur smiling while sipping a drink you made yourself?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_118.korean: 하겠다고 선언한 이상, 나 역시 제대로 할 생각이다.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_118.english: Since I’ve declared I’ll do it, I intend to see it through properly.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_121.english: Let’s show everyone the spirit of Poseidon!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_124.english: You said you’d even give them a uniform…

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_125.korean: 설마 용이 입고 있는 저런 꼴사나운 유니폼은 아니겠지?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_125.english: Surely it’s not that hideous uniform the dragon’s wearing, right?
